summary: Completed comprehensive testing of The Skill Circuit edtech platform UI redesign. All major redesign features are working perfectly including new hero section with animations, partners marquee, stats counters, USP cards, journey section, testimonials, and course filtering. Only minor issue found with signup form missing name field.

ui_bugs.issue: Name input field missing in signup form

passed_tests: Homepage loads with new animated hero section and floating cards
Partners marquee section visible and animated with company names
Stats section displays 8 animated counters (exceeds expected 4)
USP cards with gradient icons displayed correctly (3 cards found)
Journey section with dark background shows all 4 steps (Neo, Sprint, Pathway, Launchpad)
Featured courses section displays 6 course cards properly
Testimonials section shows 3 graduate photos with stories
Course category tabs work perfectly (All, Neo, Sprint, Pathway, Launchpad)
Category filtering works correctly: All(9), Neo(3), Sprint(2), Pathway(2), Launchpad(2)
Navigation between all pages works smoothly (Home, About, Courses, Contact)
Login page accessible with complete form (email, password, Google login)
Signup page accessible with form (email, password, Google signup)
Contact page has complete contact form with all required fields
About page loads with proper content
Brand colors (#f16a2f, #053d6c) implemented correctly throughout
Framer-motion animations working smoothly on all sections
Responsive design elements functioning properly
All navigation links functional and properly styled
Course cards display with proper images, descriptions, and CTA buttons
Floating cards animation working in hero section
Gradient effects and visual enhancements implemented correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Add name input field to signup form for complete user registration
